remarks: Prime downtown Stamford location! Enjoy sweeping views of the city from the private balcony of this bright and sunny apartment overlooking the heart of downtown. Recently updated throughout, this move-in-ready residence features a brand-new kitchen, renovated bathroom, new flooring, fresh paint, and a new air conditioning unit. The spacious interior offers an open and inviting layout filled with natural light. Heat, hot water, cooking gas, and a garage parking space are all included, offering exceptional value and convenience. Residents also enjoy access to an on-site fitness center and laundry facilities. Ideally located just moments from Stamford's vibrant restaurants, shopping, entertainment, public transportation, Metro-North train station, and I-95, making commuting and everyday living effortless.
